notes: Master-Reorg SHIP R-2a — Deploy detail gains a BURNDOWN + AUDITS door (additive, redesign-gated, legacy byte-identical). This is the CLEAN additive half of R-2; the risky half (TOOLS-grid deletion + BLAST RADIUS entry + PHASE WORK/LOG NOTE strand folds) is held for R-2b, gated on John's device-verify of this home — the program's verify-before-delete rule. (1) New helper deploy_detailTool(id, tab): renders an OPS_TABS ops-tool (burndown/audits — both take a container) into the detail host (deploy_opsHost → #wk-deploy under redesign) with a single '‹ Back' → deploy_showDetail(id). Deliberately does NOT nav_push (the header back is the sole exit; deploy_showDetail already owns the {d:'deploy:id'} history entry) so NO shared-router/nav_restore change was needed — no gate-stop tripped. Redesign-guarded. (2) deploy_showDetail gains a redesign-only 'Row 2.4' DEPLOYMENT TOOLS row (BURNDOWN [zap/gold] + AUDITS [clipboard/orange]) inside the existing actions column, wired to deploy_detailTool. Gated if(redesign_isOn()) so ?legacy=1 output is byte-identical (legacy reaches burndown/audits via the #ops-tab-strip, untouched). (3) TOOLS grid (⚙ TOOLS + deploy_showTools + deploy_showOpsTool) LEFT INTACT — nothing stranded; two doors tolerated this ship by design. No new assets; reuses existing _ico glyphs + OPS_TABS renderers. VERIFIED by a 3-lens adversarial pass (legacy byte-identity / functional render / side-effects+nav — all CONFIRMED_SAFE). TWO HONEST FLAGS surfaced: (a) burndown/audits renderers show a GLOBAL list (loadJobs()/load(), NOT filtered by dep.id) — the spec calls them 'per-deployment' but the code isn't; this door adds reachability, real per-deployment scoping is a separate later change (comments corrected to say so). (b) PRE-EXISTING (not from this ship): drilling into a burndown job / audit card renders into the hidden legacy #ops-content under redesign, so the drill-in looks inert — affects the existing TOOLS-grid door identically, no regression; candidate fix for R-2b/R4. DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD-STOP, clear SW cache first): open a deployment detail → a DEPLOYMENT TOOLS row shows BURNDOWN + AUDITS; tap BURNDOWN → the burndown list renders, '‹ Back' returns to the same detail; same for AUDITS; the old ⚙ TOOLS grid still works too (both doors live); ?legacy=1 identical (no BURNDOWN/AUDITS row in legacy detail). ROLLBACK: revert the commit. NOTE: cork still open — John owes device-verify of .167/.168/.169; R-2b is parked on this verify.
